title: VL+ Dark GUI
description: Makes the GUI dark both vanilla aspects and Ventureland GUI + GUI items
body:
# The VL+ Dark GUI pack
does wat it says on the tin changes ur experience on the ventuerland server by making the GUI dark instaed of brown
It does this by changing the vanilla textures to a dark asthetic
but also the Ventuerland specific parts of the GUI like the hotbar, also the items used for server GUI

Use this pack if u want a dark GUI for the Ventureland minecraft server
